de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct

Class InitArrayCreation

  • java.lang.Object
    • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaSourceElement
      • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaProgramElement
        • de.uka.ilkd.key.java.JavaNonTerminalProgramElement
          • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.ProgramTransformer
            • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.InitArray
              • de.uka.ilkd.key.rule.metaconstruct.InitArrayCreation
  • All Implemented Interfaces:
    Expression, ExpressionContainer, ModelElement, NamedModelElement, NamedProgramElement, NonTerminalProgramElement, ProgramElement, Reference, MemberReference, NameReference, PackageReferenceContainer, ReferencePrefix, ReferenceSuffix, TypeReference, TypeReferenceContainer, TypeReferenceInfix, SourceElement, Statement, StatementContainer, SVSubstitute

    public class InitArrayCreation
extends InitArray
    Split an array creation expression with explicit array initializer, creating a creation expression with dimension expression and a list of assignments (-> Java language specification, 15.10) This meta construct delivers the creation expression

      Methods 
      Modifier and Type Method and Description
      private ProgramElement arrayCreationWithoutInitializers(Expression newObject, NewArray na, Services services)
      executes an array creation without initializers involved
      private If checkNegativeDimension(Expression cond, Services services)
      trying to create an array of negative length causes a NegativeArraySizeException to be thrown.
      private void createNDimensionalArray(LinkedList<Statement> bodyStmnts, Expression resultVar, KeYJavaType arrayType, ProgramVariable[] dimensions, Services services)
      creates an array of dimension dimensions.length

      creates statements for evaluation of the dimension expressions, check if a dimension is non-negative and adds them to given list of statements.
      ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe, Services services, SVInstantiations svInst)
      performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation

    • Constructor Detail

        public InitArrayCreation(SchemaVariable newObjectSV,
                 ProgramElement newExpr)

    • Method Detail

      • checkNegativeDimension

        private If checkNegativeDimension(Expression cond,
                        Services services)
        trying to create an array of negative length causes a NegativeArraySizeException to be thrown. The if statement implementing this behaviour is created by this method.
        Parameters:
        cond - the Expression representing the guard checking if the given length is negative or not
        services - the Services offering access to the type model
        Returns:
        an if statement throwing a NegativeArraySizeException if cond is evaluated to false

      • evaluateAndCheckDimensionExpressions

        private ProgramVariable[] evaluateAndCheckDimensionExpressions(LinkedList<Statement> bodyStmnts,
                                                     ImmutableArray<Expression> dimExpr,
                                                     Services services)
        creates statements for
        1. evaluation of the dimension expressions,
        3. check if a dimension is non-negative
        and adds them to given list of statements. Further more the new declared program variables initialised with the evaluated dimension expressions are returned
        Parameters:
        bodyStmnts - the LinkedList of statements where the new statements are inserted
        dimExpr - the ArrayOf which describe the array's dimensions
        services - the Services object

      • createNDimensionalArray

        private void createNDimensionalArray(LinkedList<Statement> bodyStmnts,
                           Expression resultVar,
                           KeYJavaType arrayType,
                           ProgramVariable[] dimensions,
                           Services services)
        creates an array of dimension dimensions.length

      • arrayCreationWithoutInitializers

        private ProgramElement arrayCreationWithoutInitializers(Expression newObject,
                                              NewArray na,
                                              Services services)
        executes an array creation without initializers involved

      • transform

        public ProgramElement transform(ProgramElement pe,
                       Services services,
                       SVInstantiations svInst)
        Description copied from class: ProgramTransformer
        performs the program transformation needed for symbolic program transformation
        Specified by:
        transform in class ProgramTransformer
        Parameters:
        pe - the ProgramElement on which the execution is performed
        services - the Services with all necessary information about the java programs
        svInst - the instantiations of the schemavariables
        Returns:
        the transformated program
